tex:
The Venn diagram shows information about the number of students in a class.

Some study English (E), some study French (F), some study Spanish (S) and some do not study any of these languages.
\newline

\newline

(ii) One student is picked at random from those who study Spanish.
\newline
Find the probability that this student studies exactly two languages.
\newline

\newline
Give your answer in terms of $\vec{a}$ and/or $\vec{b}$ and in its simplest form.
\newline

(ii) The lines MN and OR are extended to meet at S.
\newline
Find the position vector of S.
